title: R8 (disambiguation)
content:
'''R8''' can refer to:

*[[R8-series astromech droid]], a line of [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]]
*[[R8-B7]], an individual [[astromech droid]]
**[[R8-B7/Legends|R8-B7]], the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] version of this [[Droid/Legends|droid]]

{{Disambig}}
